content.body: Hi folks. The ICU4X meeting is moving fully to the Thursday 9am PT time slot (it was already there on the alternating weeks). I'd like to move the numerics meeting to either 10am or 8am.
I would prefer 10am, so I don't have another day with an 8am meeting
If the ask is to move the meeting to start an hour later than it currently does, that would work for me. An hour earlier would not work.
